description: Pinned corpus: the Swiss Federal Act on Insurance Contracts (Versicherungsvertragsgesetz, VVG / SR 221.229.1; French: Loi sur le contrat d'assurance, LCA), consolidated version in force 2024-01-01, fetched from the Fedlex filestore (official federal law portal). One law, multiple official language versions. The date pins the consolidation; a newer consolidation changes the checksum and the corpus version is bumped deliberately.
law: SR 221.229.1 — Bundesgesetz über den Versicherungsvertrag (Versicherungsvertragsgesetz, VVG)
